purpose: Rotate the selected eight-band CdTe static smoke into the exact Novik basis using an isospectral polar/parallel-transport reconstruction, fix only the remaining discrete inter-irrep signs, apply two-radius matrix extrapolation, fit on [001] and [111], and reserve [110] as a closure holdout.

reconstruction.scientific_interpretation: The selected-band polar Hamiltonian is exactly isospectral to the target DFT manifold in the fixed Gamma reference basis.
reconstruction.diagnostic_interpretation: The all-state construction approaches P_Gamma H(k) P_Gamma and is retained only to quantify the superseded quadratic-order reconstruction error.

sign_convention.Gamma8: choose the unique sign giving P8 > 0
sign_convention.Gamma7: choose the unique sign giving P7 > 0

claim_boundary: Any extracted numbers are static planning-geometry method-smoke values from unconverged PBE inputs in the explicitly stated fixed-Gamma polar gauge. The reconstruction must remain isospectral to selected bands 31-38. The linear and quadratic parameter blocks are gated independently. Values in a failed block are not validated even as method-smoke parameters. Individual matrix coefficients are representation-dependent under additional smooth k-dependent unitary changes of effective basis. No result is a reference CdTe material parameter, and no result authorizes phonon, AHC, HgTe, alloy, or higher-band static work.
